_meta.status: MACHINE-DRAFT — every string below is a machine-generated draft and MUST be reviewed by a fluent Twi speaker before release. Keys without a reviewed value fall back to English at runtime.

auth.loginSubtitle: Hyɛn mu na hwɛ wo adwuma nkyerɛwee.
auth.signupSubtitle: Kyerɛw wo din wɔ simma kakraa mu, yɛbɛkyerɛ wo ɛkwan.

dashboard.noCasesTitle: Woasiesie wo ho sɛ wobɛfi wo adwuma ase?
dashboard.noCasesBody: Bua nsɛm kakraa, nya boɔ ntɛm ara, na yɛbɛhwɛ aban dwumadibea biara ama wo.
dashboard.nothingNeeded: Biribiara nhia wo seesei — yɛbɛma woate bere a biribi sesa. 🎉

money.title: Sika
money.subtitle: Fa nkrataa kɔ wo adetɔfoɔ hɔ na di wo ka ho dwuma.
money.notAccountingNote: Yei yɛ adwinnadeɛ a ɛnyɛ duru, ɛnyɛ akawntabuo software a ɛyɛ ma. Ɛremfa wo tow — fa CSV no kɔma wo akawntanibuni.

referrals.title: Kyerɛ na nya
referrals.subtitle: Kyɛ wo koodu. Sɛ w'adamfo kyerɛw n'adwuma na ɔtua ka a, mo baanu nyinaa nya sika.
referrals.empty: Sika biara nni hɔ — kyɛ wo koodu na fi ase nya.
